concept: Create a game where you play as an elderly gardener with the magical ability to instantly grow plants using life energy drawn from yourself. Each plant grown ages the protagonist slightly, creating a resource management challenge where overusing your powers leads to decreased mobility and strength. The garden exists in a dying world where your flourishing plants gradually restore color and life to the surrounding environment. Certain rare seeds can be discovered that yield plants with special properties to help overcome increasing environmental challenges. Your goal is to restore enough of the world before your inevitable mortality catches up, requiring careful planning of which areas to rejuvenate first.
